prompts: Row. I do not need you to do it the manual way. The whole fucking point is fix the orchestration pipeline, please.

Okay. Well, first thing, why is Sonnet giving them a massive dispatch? What are you talking about? The brains just live in the brain bro. They got access to every fucking part of the brain. They got all the fucking same powers as you bro. Why is Sonnet being an Uber fish and giving them massive dispatch? No. Don't give them anything bro. Why is the librarian giving them anything? The whole point, you give them the map. And tell them to go fucking do it themselves, bro.
